query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS encharge_broadcasts (
  id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
  broadcast_id INT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  status VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
  email_id INT,
  subject VARCHAR(500),
  from_email VARCHAR(255),
  from_name VARCHAR(255),
  segment_id INT,
  segment_name VARCHAR(255),
  send_at TIMESTAMP NULL,
  delivered INT DEFAULT 0,
  opens INT DEFAULT 0,
  clicks INT DEFAULT 0,
  bounces INT DEFAULT 0,
  unsubscribes INT DEFAULT 0,
  spam INT DEFAULT 0,
  open_rate DECIMAL(5,2),
  click_rate DECIMAL(5,2),
  click_to_open_rate DECIMAL(5,2),
  last_synced_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  metrics_stale BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX encharge_broadcasts_broadcast_id_idx (broadcast_id),
  INDEX encharge_broadcasts_status_idx (status),
  INDEX encharge_broadcasts_send_at_idx (send_at)
);
